landing.badge: The new standard for digital business cards
landing.subtitle: Bring your social media, projects, and content together in one place. Vibelink is the fastest way to create a beautiful profile page you'll be proud of.
landing.mockup_bio: I design, code, and drink too much coffee. Check out my work! 🚀
landing.features_subtitle: Focus on creating. We handle the tech. Vibelink gives you the tools to manage your audience professionally.
landing.f1_desc: Choose themes, customize colors, and make your profile look exactly like your personal brand.
landing.f2_desc: Zero lag. Add a link, change a photo – your fans see the changes in real-time.
landing.f3_desc: Manage link order, hide them temporarily, and get ready for the upcoming analytics module.
landing.footer_title: Ready to take your profile to the next level?
